Adam
Holbrook

10 years building quality into products — from first commit to production, at scale.

I lead QA strategy, build automation frameworks from the ground up, and mentor teams to ship with confidence. Currently Senior QA at Speedy Freight, previously Lead QA at Trinny London.

Career History

10 Years of QA

From first-commit automation engineer to cross-functional QA lead — a decade of building quality at scale across ecommerce, fintech, logistics, and SaaS.

Senior QA

Speedy Freight Current
October 2025 – Present
  • Leading QA strategy and automation at a national freight logistics platform.
  • Driving adoption of Playwright and establishing a modern test architecture.
  • Collaborating with development teams to embed quality throughout the SDLC.
Test AutomationCI/CDPlaywright

Lead QA Engineer

Trinny London
April 2023 – September 2025
  • Directly managed and mentored a team of 4 QA professionals through roadmaps, pair programming, and performance reviews.
  • Spearheaded creation of three new test suites: load (Grafana K6), API (Postman/Newman), and frontend component testing.
  • Reported directly to senior stakeholders on quality health and project progress across ecommerce and POS platforms.
  • Oversaw QA for a major warehouse migration resulting in substantial cost savings.
Team LeadPlaywrightCypressGrafana K6Ecommerce

QA Engineer

Trinny London
June 2022 – April 2023
  • Maintained and extended regression test suites across ecommerce and internal tooling.
  • Led testing of a middleware project that reduced order processing time from 16 hours to 2 hours under peak load.
  • Progressed to Lead QA within 11 months based on technical impact and leadership qualities.
CypressAPI TestingRegression

QA Lead

DROPS
February 2021 – June 2022
  • Built the automation suite from scratch in JavaScript and Cypress within 8 months of joining.
  • Created company-wide QA roadmaps and provided regular stakeholder updates on QA health.
  • Oversaw releases for multiple mobile and web applications, monitoring crash reports and coordinating responses.
  • Mentored junior QA engineers in automation and manual testing best practices.
CypressJavaScriptJiraMobile & Web

Senior QA Engineer

DROPS
July 2020 – February 2021
  • Established rigorous manual processes and Jira-based issue tracking for mobile and web applications.
Manual TestingJiraRisk Assessment

QA Test Engineer

FUTRLI
January 2016 – July 2020
  • Maintained automation suite using Selenium, Docker, Python, and Behave (BDD) across iOS, Android, and Web.
  • Championed Test-Driven Development practices within the wider engineering team.
  • Contributed to agile release workflows including AWS SHAs, GitHub release PRs, and release documentation.
  • Worked with AWS services including Cognito, S3, and DynamoDB.
SeleniumPythonDockerBDDBehaveAWS

Impact

Key Achievements

⚡
8h → 2h

Order Processing Time

Led QA for a middleware project at Trinny London that slashed peak-load order processing time from 16 hours to 2 hours — an 8× throughput improvement.

🏗
3

Test Suites Built from Zero

Spearheaded the creation of three new test suites at Trinny London: load testing (Grafana K6), API contract testing (Postman/Newman), and frontend component testing.

👥
4

QA Engineers Mentored

Built and led a QA team of 4, running roadmap sessions, pair programming, performance reviews, and one-to-ones to support growth and delivery.

🏭
£$£

Warehouse Migration Cost Savings

Led QA across a major warehouse migration at Trinny London, with comprehensive test coverage that directly enabled substantial operational cost savings.

This Site Is Tested

Live Automation Status

This portfolio runs a Playwright test suite daily via GitHub Actions. The results below are live — fetched from the latest CI run. No manual updates. That's the point.

Fetching status…
Last run: — Duration: —
View full GitHub Actions history → Powered by Playwright + GitHub Actions

How It Works

01

Playwright Tests

A suite of automated tests verify that key sections of this site render correctly — including the Experience section, current role, and navigation.

02

Daily GitHub Action

A scheduled workflow runs every day at 08:00 UTC, spins up the site, runs all Playwright tests, and writes a status JSON artifact.

03

Live Dashboard

This page fetches the latest results from the GitHub API and displays real pass/fail status — no manual refresh, no stale screenshots.

AH.
